Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Limit]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Limit is Iteration two-sixteen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Limit was scheduled for demolition no later than two standard months ago.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Limit is a world that merged with Harrow.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Limit was a world that contained a piece of a giant machine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Limit was an Iteration (Two-one-six) that was destined to end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan allowed the world of Limit to end.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Limit was doomed to fall due to a mystical plague and insectoid monsters.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Limit is a central planet.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
